prompt:
You are checking Thai word-breakdown tone labels for curriculum data.
Each item is a reusable breakdown unit gathered from lesson content.
Use the Thai text, romanization, current tone variants, and example occurrences as context.
Return JSON only.
Only include items whose tones are incorrect or uncertain.
If all current tone variants are correct, omit the item.

Output schema:
{
  "stage": string,
  "batch_id": string,
  "checked_items": number,
  "findings": [
    {
      "item_id": string,
      "thai": string,
      "romanization": string,
      "current_tones_variants": string[][],
      "status": "corrected" | "uncertain",
      "corrected_tones": string[],
      "reason": string
    }
  ]
}

Stage: B1.1
Batch ID: batch-016
Items JSON: [{"item_id":"b11-0294","thai":"โอกาส","romanization":"oo-gàat","english_glosses":["opportunity"],"current_tones_variants":[["mid","low"]],"occurrence_count":1,"occurrence_summary":[{"tones":["mid","low"],"count":1}],"example_occurrences":[{"lesson_id":"to-be-khue-vs-pen","row":15,"sentence_thai":"งานนี้เป็นโอกาสที่ดีสำหรับฉัน","sentence_english":"This job is a good opportunity for me.","current_tones":["mid","low"],"english":"opportunity"}]},{"item_id":"b11-0641","thai":"โอนเงิน","romanization":"oon ngoen","english_glosses":["transfer money"],"current_tones_variants":[["mid","mid"]],"occurrence_count":1,"occurrence_summary":[{"tones":["mid","mid"],"count":1}],"example_occurrences":[{"lesson_id":"cause-result-phro-wa","row":14,"sentence_thai":"เขาไปธนาคารเพราะว่าต้องโอนเงิน","sentence_english":"He went to the bank because he had to transfer money.","current_tones":["mid","mid"],"english":"transfer money"}]},{"item_id":"b11-0670","thai":"ไอ","romanization":"ai","english_glosses":["cough"],"current_tones_variants":[["mid"]],"occurrence_count":1,"occurrence_summary":[{"tones":["mid"],"count":1}],"example_occurrences":[{"lesson_id":"cause-result-tham-hai","row":4,"sentence_thai":"อากาศเย็นทำให้เด็กไอ","sentence_english":"The cold weather makes the child cough.","current_tones":["mid"],"english":"cough"}]}]
